meaning: n.[化]碳氢化合物分裂,氢化裂解
examples: The processing capacity of hydrocracking units accounts for 12.4% of the total crude processing capacity in China.
Residuum suspended bed hydrocracking process at medium pressure was studied by using homogeneous design experimental project.
This paper introduces the application of TS3000 in the emergency pressure release interlock system for hydrocracking unit by the example.
The diluted sycrude must be extensively processed before it can be distilled, most commonly through catalytic hydrocracking.
